title: dryopteris navarrensis
intro: Dryopteris navarrensis, also known as the Navarrese lady fern, is a species of fern native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Dryopteris navarrensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
